companyText: KITCHENPERMIT HOME SERVICE REPORT SAMPLE RESOURCES PRICING ACCOUNT Company Reports COMPANY VERSION // $79/MO Save your company info once. Send every report under your name. The paid path for saved company details, clean inspection PDFs, retained service report links, customer history, and next-service follow-up for hood cleaning companies that want the report to carry their name. Set up company branding View account View sample report View pricing WHAT GETS SAVED COMPANY IDENTITY Company name, logo, report color, service area, and customer-facing contact. REPLY PATH Phone, dispatch email, and the action buttons customers use after service. RETAINED DELIVERY Paid service report links and PDF copies stay available after creation. CUSTOMER HISTORY Saved restaurant/site records, next-service timing, and resend-ready customer messages. BUILDER VS COMPANY VERSION The free builder makes one report. The company version makes it usable. 1. SAVE COMPANY PROFILE Logo, report color, and contact details become the default. 2. BUILD EACH JOB REPORT Use the builder for photos, open items, and next actions. 3. SEND BRANDED OUTPUT The restaurant receives a clean link and PDF under the vendor name. 4. WORK THE ACCOUNT HISTORY Account history shows repeat customers, next service timing, and the message to send. PAID VERSION $79/mo for the version customers should actually receive. Free output is intentionally limited: no company logo/contact, 7-day links, watermarked PDFs, and no history. The company version removes those limits and turns saved reports into a simple follow-up workspace. Set up company branding Preview company mode INCLUDED IN COMPANY VERSION Saved company profile Logo upload and report color No PDF watermark Retained service report links and PDF copies Customer/site history Next-service follow-up view Customer-ready send message Optional design help from $249 FOR YOUR COMPANY If the sample works, see how it looks under your company name. SET UP COMPANY REPORTS KITCHENPERMIT Branded hood service report links and PDFs for hood cleaning companies. Turn field photos, open items, and next steps into a restaurant-ready report after every visit.
